message:
feat(demo-showcase): expand macro recorder with timeline visualization

Enhance the macro recorder demo screen with additional functionality:

- Add timeline panel showing recorded events with timestamps
- Improve visual feedback during recording and playback states
- Add event count and duration display in status area
- Better handling of edge cases (empty recordings, rapid events)

These changes complement the proptest additions to the runtime
by providing visual confirmation of macro behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
